description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low stone wall and landscaped with patches of green grass, shrubs, and a few coniferous trees. The house features a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and large window openings. The exterior walls are finished in a light stone or concrete texture, and the property includes a paved driveway or walkway leading up to the main entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The main entryway is recessed, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang, emphasizing the contemporary aesthetic. The backyard is enclosed and landscaped, offering private outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light stone exterior, asymmetrical windows, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stone wall, flat roof, and a large green backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, additional windows, and a secondary entry or patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, stone wall, and two prominent trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a plain door, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
